Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 12th, 2010 (Wide) by Fox Searchlight
Video Release: July 13th, 2010 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some sexual content and brief strong language.
Running Time: 103 minutes
Plot point: African Americans, Bigotry, Doctors, Dysfunctional Family, Family Secrets, In-Laws / Future In-Laws, Interracial Romance, Lawyers, Romance

Subgenre: Family Comedy
Target audience: Hispanic
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
